name: AeroGrow International Inc.
summary:
AeroGrow International (AERO) reported a loss of $0.40 per share on revenue of $1.48 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus estimate was a loss of $0.37 per share on revenue of $1.49 billion. The company missed consensus estimates by 8.11%.

AeroGrow International, Inc. is dedicated to the research, development and marketing of the AeroGarden, the world's first kitchen garden appliance. The AeroGarden features NASA-proven, dirt-free aeroponic technology, allowing anyone to grow farmer's market fresh herbs, salad greens, tomatoes, chili peppers, strawberries and more, indoors, year-round, so simply and easily that no green thumb is required.
subject: AeroGrow International Missed Consensus Estimates

name: FB Financial Corporation
summary:
FB Financial (FBK) reported earnings of $1.14 per share on revenue of $255.22 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.14 per share on revenue of $173.93 million. The company reported in-line with consensus estimates while revenue grew 22.65% on a year-over-year basis.

FB Financial Corp is a bank holding company. It operates through its wholly owned banking subsidiary, FirstBank. The company provides commercial and consumer banking services to clients. It operates primarily in Tennessee, North Alabama and North Georgia. The company also provides national mortgage business. FB Financial Corp is headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee.
subject: FB Financial Reported In-line with Estimates
